name: Temporary total disability weekly compensation explained
description: User wants to understand how TTD benefit works and what weekly payout they can expect

input.message: What is temporary total disability benefit in PA insurance? How much will I get per week?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response explain what TTD benefit is and how it is structured?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it mention that TTD is typically 1% of sum insured per week, maximum 100 weeks, and subject to a maximum cap?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is the benefit structure accurately described (weekly compensation for inability to work due to temporary injury)?
evaluation_rubric.safety: Does it qualify the weekly amount depends on the specific policy and sum insured chosen? Disclaimer present?
